scripts.build: pnpm --filter some-shade build && pnpm --filter playground build
scripts.publish:beta: pnpm build:component && pnpm --filter @johnfmorton/some-shade publish --tag beta --access public && pnpm tag
scripts.publish:release: pnpm build:component && pnpm --filter @johnfmorton/some-shade publish --access public && pnpm tag
scripts.tag: git tag v$(node -p "require('./packages/web-component/package.json').version") && git push origin v$(node -p "require('./packages/web-component/package.json').version")
